summary: OMS Phase 1 Improvements Testing Complete - All 25 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend features verified. Three new features working: Order Number Strategy (ORD-YYYY-NNNNNN), Search Endpoint (/api/orders/search), Optimistic Locking (version field with 409 conflict).
passed_tests: ✅ Order Number Format: New orders have ORD-YYYY-NNNNNN format (e.g., ORD-2026-000001)
✅ Order numbers increment sequentially within year
✅ Update with correct version succeeds and increments version
✅ Update with wrong version returns 409 Conflict
✅ Existing CRUD still works: create, list, get detail, update
✅ Frontend: Search input field present and works
✅ Frontend: Settlement status filter present and works
✅ Frontend: Date range filters present and work
✅ Frontend: Order numbers display ORD-YYYY-NNNNNN format
✅ Frontend: Order detail page loads correctly
✅ Frontend: Navigation between list and detail works
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_* prefixed orders for testing (e.g., TEST_customer_format, TEST_version_check, etc.). These are cleaned up automatically or can be filtered out.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OMS Phase 1 with improvements fully tested. New features: (1) Order number format ORD-YYYY-NNNNNN, (2) /api/orders/search endpoint with filters: status, channel, agency_id, customer_id, supplier_code, order_number, date_from, date_to, settlement_status, q, (3) Optimistic locking with version field - PATCH returns 409 on version mismatch. 47 orders exist in the system. All UI components have data-testid attributes. searchOrders() in ordersApi.js calls the new search endpoint.

optimistic_locking.behavior: 409 Conflict on mismatch, backwards compatible without version
